description: All-in-one diffusion-model LoRA trainer (FLUX, LTX 2.3, Wan, SDXL)
fullDescription:
AI Toolkit by Ostris is an all-in-one training suite for diffusion models, designed for consumer-grade hardware. Train LoRAs and fine-tune via a web UI or CLI.

Supported models:
- Image: FLUX.1 dev, FLUX.2 dev / klein-base (4B + 9B), SDXL, SD 1.5
- Video: LTX-2, LTX-2.3, Wan 2.1 (1.3B + 14B T2V/I2V at 480p/720p), Wan 2.2 (A14B T2V/I2V, TI2V 5B)

Features:
- Web UI on port 8675 exposed via Olares entrance
- YAML-driven CLI for reproducible runs
- INT8 + gradient checkpointing for 32 GB VRAM training
- Sampling during training
- Trained LoRAs land in the shared model lib so ComfyUI / ComfyUI Studio load them with no copy step
name: aitoolkit
title: AI Toolkit
